ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the track was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "track_length" INTEGER /* Length of the track in seconds */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the track */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the track */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track based on user interactions */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of plays for the track */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Total number of likes for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the artist was added to the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the artist information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (for hierarchical genre structure) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the genre was added to the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the genre information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the track */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, like, comment) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user played the track */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user liked the track */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments the user left on the track */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user shared the track */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the track (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., listener, artist, admin) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* User's biography or profile description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lyrics_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the lyrics (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "keyword_list" TEXT /* List of keywords extracted from the lyrics */,
  "theme_list" TEXT /* List of themes identified in the lyrics */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "lyrics_length" INTEGER /* Length of the lyrics in characters */,
  "lyrics_language" TEXT /* Language of the lyrics */,
  "lyrics_translations" TEXT /* Array of JSON objects containing translations of the lyrics in different languages */,
  "lyrics_analysis_version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis tool used */,
  "lyrics_analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lyrics_analysis_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_spam" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is marked as spam */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is flagged by users */,
  "replies_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the comment */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track included in the playlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is private */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last updated */,
  "track_order" INTEGER /* Order of the track in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
